sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25477" key="dia/pezos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διάπεζος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, of women's robes, either <sense id="n25477.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reaching to the feet</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having a border</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πέζα</etym>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
